buildCommand: if [ ! -d "flutter_sdk" ]; then git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable --depth 1 flutter_sdk; fi && export PATH="$PATH:$PWD/flutter_sdk/bin" && flutter config --no-analytics >/dev/null && flutter config --enable-web >/dev/null && flutter build web --release
installCommand: echo 'Flutter SDK is installed during buildCommand'
